name: Zembile E-Commerce
desc: Full-stack e-commerce platform for buying and selling products online in Ethiopia. Built with a modern web stack.

name: Zembile Dashboard
desc: Admin dashboard for the Zembile e-commerce platform — manage products, orders, and users.

name: Zembile Mobile View
desc: Responsive mobile interface of the Zembile e-commerce platform.

name: School Management System
desc: Built for Tilili General Secondary & Preparatory School (TGSPS). Manages student records, grades, and administration.

name: School Management System
desc: Dashboard view of the TGSPS school management system showing student data and reports.

name: Car Rental Website
desc: A full-featured car rental platform for browsing and booking vehicles online.
